law_M0803: A chart is certified across THREE surfaces, not one: data (recompute with a ruler the author didn't control), encoding (read the number back out of the geometry), and RHETORIC (the caption/title/emphasis asserts an interpretation the geometry does not inherently carry, and must meet the same evidentiary bar as the data).
